title: Sabarimala reference hearing: Live updates from Supreme Court - Day 10
description: Senior Advocate Indira Jaising: One aspect is conscience, which is between you and yourself. You need not go to a temple at all if you do not wish to. It does not mean you are irreligious or not a Hindu. But if you wish to go, then that right is protected under Article 25(1). That is my submission. This right has always been a civil right. It is a right in rem. There is no magic about it. It is a civil right. What is the meaning of a right in rem. A right in rem determines my status. Just as mar
